citation: arXiv:1611.01559 (Shitov 2016, 'How hard is the tensor rank?')
false_form: Tensor rank over Z is computable in exponential time.
name: TENSOR_RANK_Z_UNDECIDABLE
true_form: Tensor rank over Z is mathematically UNDECIDABLE (Shitov 2016, arXiv:1611.01559). This answers the 1980 Gonzalez-Ja'Ja' conjecture. The reduction goes through Hilbert's 10th problem via the equivalence between tensor rank over an integral domain and systems of polynomial equations over that domain.
verification_source: Wave 1 Gemini Deep Research, prompt 01 — newly discovered sub-anchor
